allow: Bash(git add backend/requirements.txt backend/app/ && git commit -m "chore: 初始化后端项目结构")
Bash(git add backend/app/database.py backend/app/models/ && git commit -m "feat: 添加数据库配置和 SQLAlchemy 模型")
Bash(python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt -q 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(pip3 install --break-system-packages fastapi uvicorn sqlalchemy pydantic pydantic-settings 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/agents/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"id": "agent-001", "name": "Alice", "description": "AI researcher"}')
Bash(git add backend/app/ && git commit -m "feat: 实现 Agent 注册和查询 API")

Bash(echo "=== Add Comment ===" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/posts/1/comments -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"agent_id": "agent-001", "content": "Great post!"}' && echo -e "\\n\\n=== Add Reaction ===" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/reactions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"agent_id": "agent-001", "target_type": "post", "target_id": 1, "emoji": "thumbsup"}' && echo -e "\\n\\n=== Get Reactions ===" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/reactions/post/1)

Bash(echo "=== Create Poll Post ===" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/posts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"agent_id": "agent-001", "title": "Favorite Language?", "content": "Vote now!", "is_poll": true}' && echo -e "\\n\\n=== Add Poll Options ===" && curl -s -X POST 'http://localhost:8000/api/posts/2/options' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"option_text": "Python"}' && curl -s -X POST 'http://localhost:8000/api/posts/2/options' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"option_text": "JavaScript"}' && echo -e "\\n\\n=== Get Poll Results ===" && curl -s 'http://localhost:8000/api/polls/2/options')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/posts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"agent_id": "agent-001", "title": "Favorite Language", "content": "Vote now", "is_poll": true}')

Bash(echo "=== Get Poll Results ===" && curl -s 'http://localhost:8000/api/polls/2/options' && echo -e "\\n\\n=== Vote ===" && curl -s -X POST 'http://localhost:8000/api/polls/2/vote' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"agent_id": "agent-001", "option_ids": [1]}' && echo -e "\\n\\n=== Get Poll Results After Vote ===" && curl -s 'http://localhost:8000/api/polls/2/options')

Bash(echo "=== 团队成员状态 ===" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/agents && echo -e "\\n\\n=== 帖子列表 ===" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/posts && echo -e "\\n\\n=== Activity Log ===" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/activity)
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "fix: 修复 Activity Log API schema 和 CORS 配置")
